channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 uzairansaruzi/hermex (663 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: uzairansaruzi

📝 Repository: uzairansaruzi/hermex

]]>

👤 Owner: humblebanana

📝 Repository: humblebanana/open-record-replay

👤 Owner: satayutata

📝 Repository: satayutata/geniemax-core

📄 Descrizione: Free, open, MIT health-analytics engine — recovery, sleep, HRV, strain, calories — no subscription. Currently reads WHOOP 5.0 / WHOOP MG sensors; iOS only (Android not yet). Golden-vector tested, pure Swift.

🍴 Forks: 35

item.title: 📝 charliehotel/MoaIMF (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: charliehotel

📝 Repository: charliehotel/MoaIMF

📄 Descrizione: 자모 분리로 한글 파일이 검색되지 않거나 경로가 꼬이는 문제를 해결하는 macOS 메뉴 막대 앱. A macOS menu bar app that fixes search and path issues caused by decomposed Korean filenames.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: filename-normalization hangul macos nfc nfd swift swiftui unicode

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-25T02:09:01Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-27T16:13:30Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 humation-labs/humation-swift (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: humation-labs

📝 Repository: humation-labs/humation-swift

📄 Descrizione: Native Swift port of Humation — a deterministic, hand-drawn SVG avatar engine rendered entirely with Core Graphics (no WebView). iOS · macOS · tvOS · visionOS.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: avatar avatar-generator avatars coregraphics deterministic identicon ios macos profile-picture spm svg swift swift-package swiftui visionos

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-24T08:52:30Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-25T14:44:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 moonbai-studio/tungsten-edge (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: moonbai-studio

📝 Repository: moonbai-studio/tungsten-edge

📄 Descrizione: A window-oriented bottom taskbar for macOS — a Dock replacement that organizes by window, not app. 以「窗口」为单位的 macOS 任务条

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: dock macos per-window swift swiftui taskbar window-manager
